channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Chain-of-Thought
channel.description: Latest Chain-of-Thought news in Context Engineering

item.title: Safer Reasoning Traces: Measuring and Mitigating Chain-of-Thought Leakage in LLMs
item.description: arXiv:2603.05618v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting improves LLM reasoning but can increase privacy risk by resurfacing personally identifiable information (PII) from the prompt into reasoning traces and outputs, even under policies that instruct the model not to restat...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, prompting, study, chain-of-thought, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Reasoning Models Struggle to Control their Chains of Thought
item.description: arXiv:2603.05706v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) monitoring is a promising tool for detecting misbehaviors and understanding the motivations of modern reasoning models. However, if models can control what they verbalize in their CoT, it could undermine CoT monitorability. To m...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> instruction, chain-of-thought, model, CoT, reasoning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Traversal-as-Policy: Log-Distilled Gated Behavior Trees as Externalized, Verifiable Policies for Safe, Robust, and Efficient Agents
item.description: arXiv:2603.05517v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autonomous LLM agents fail because long-horizon policy remains implicit in model weights and transcripts, while safety is retrofitted post hoc. We propose Traversal-as-Policy: distill sandboxed OpenHands execution logs into a single executable Gated B...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> memory, context, model, RAG, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: ThinkSound - [NeurIPS 2025] PyTorch implementation of [ThinkSound], a unified framework for generating audio from any modality, guided by Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning.
item.description: [NeurIPS 2025] PyTorch implementation of [ThinkSound], a unified framework for generating audio from any modality, guided by Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> chain-of-thought, audio, framework, CoT, reasoning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: PageIndex - 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG
item.description: 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, RAG, vector | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Cline-Recursive-Chain-of-Thought-System-CRCT- - A framework designed to manage context, dependencies, and tasks in large-scale Cline projects within VS Code
item.description: A framework designed to manage context, dependencies, and tasks in large-scale Cline projects within VS Code<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> chain-of-thought, framework, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>

item.title: cosmos-reason1 - Cosmos-Reason1 models understand the physical common sense and generate appropriate embodied decisions in natural language through long chain-of-thought reasoning processes.
item.description: Cosmos-Reason1 models understand the physical common sense and generate appropriate embodied decisions in natural language through long chain-of-thought reasoning processes.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, chain-of-thought, reasoning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
